memberdef.argsstring: (FindStr s, size_type pos, size_type count) const -> size_type
memberdef.name: find

memberdef.argsstring: (FindStr s, size_type pos, size_type count) const -> size_type
memberdef.name: rfind

memberdef.argsstring: (FindStr s, size_type pos, size_type count) const -> size_type
memberdef.name: find_first_of

memberdef.argsstring: (FindStr s, size_type pos, size_type count) const -> size_type
memberdef.name: find_first_not_of

memberdef.argsstring: (FindStr s, size_type pos, size_type count) const -> size_type
memberdef.name: find_last_of

memberdef.argsstring: (FindStr s, size_type pos, size_type count) const -> size_type
memberdef.name: find_last_not_of

detaileddescription.para: Convert the wrapped string into a char based std::string.
This helper performs the required conversion from char8_t to char and is primarily meant for interoperability with APIs that expect a regular std::string.
Get the byte size of the escaped string.
Use this function to calculate the size requirements of an escaped string, without the actual conversion.

simplesect.para: The byte size of the escaped text (without trailing zero end byte).

detaileddescription.para: Create an escaped version of this string.

parameterdescription.para: The escape mode to use for escaping.

detaileddescription.para: The class mirrors the API of std::u8string closely and adds a few convenience functions. It is primarily intended to ease the integration of the parser into applications that use std::string for text processing.

Because of unsolved problems in C++20 regarding the handling of char8_t, this thin wrapper around std::u8string aims to simplify the integration of this library into projects and also shall ease the transformation to std::u8string in future versions of C++.
@tested StringTest, StringUtf8Test
